title: Triton Style 3 9.5kW Electric Shower - Black Gloss (Aspirante, Collection 2)
features: Easy to use – Illuminated soft touch buttons power you up, power you down, and everything in between
Phased shutdown - Flushes out preheated water after use to help reduce limescale build up
Replaces Triton Aspirante, Collection 2 and Miniatures models
2 year parts and labour guarantee (UK only)
description: Whether you’re out to add a cool feature to your bathroom or find inspiration for a complete bathroom renovation, The Style 3 puts cutting-edge design at the heart of your bathroom. Easy to use – Illuminated soft touch buttons power you up, power you down, and everything in between Compact slim design Push button Start/ Stop to select your favourite shower setting every time Phased shutdown - Flushes out preheated water after use to help reduce limescale build up Replaces Triton Aspirante, Collection 2 and Miniatures models 2 year parts and labour guarantee (UK only) Efficient A energy rating
